title: Happy.appの開発状況を調べて、残タスクを教えて
summary_text: No edits. Review lane conclusion: **Recommended production verification path (Happy.app)** 1. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-production-smoke.sh` 2. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-simulation-lanes.sh` 3. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-peripheral-adapter-contract.sh` Why these: - The official pre-cutover entrypoint is explicitly `test-production-smoke.sh` in [kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md#L59) and also listed in [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/README.md#L131). - The official parallel gate is `test-simulation-lanes.sh` in [kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md#L58). - `test-peripheral-adapter-contract.sh` adds boundary-level evidence for `railway-happy-web-boundary` in [test-peripheral-adapter-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-peripheral-adapter-contract.sh#L28). **Evidence these commands produce** - `test-production-smoke.sh` emits: - `PASS [apps-happy-web-behavior-contract]` - `PASS [apps-happy-web-ui-dom-contract]` - `PASS [apps-happy-web-auth-stale-reauth-smoke]` - `PASS [happy-secretary-intake-server]` - `PASS [apps-happy-web-production-smoke]` - Source: [test-production-smoke.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-production-smoke.sh) - `test-simulation-lanes.sh` emits per-lane PASS logs and final `PASS [apps-happy-web-simulation-lanes]`. - Source: [test-simulation-lanes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-simulation-lanes.sh) - `test-peripheral-adapter-contract.sh` emits `PASS [railway-happy-web-boundary]` and `=== Results: 6/6 passed, 0 failed ===`. - Source: [test-peripheral-adapter-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-peripheral-adapter-contract.sh) **Gaps remaining** - These are mostly pre-prod/local contract checks; they do not directly probe deployed `/api/happy/*` endpoints in live environment. - No single automated Happy-specific live deploy+probe script is present under `apps/happy-web`/`tests`/`scripts`; live cutover evidence in docs is historical status, not a reproducible current command path for Happy endpoints. - `production-smoke` validates secretary intake via local temporary server ([test-happy-secretary-intake-server.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-happy-secretary-intake-server.sh)), not production backend connectivity.
